question: In 2007, a Bosnian man survived a wife's assassination attempt because the bullet was stopped by his ______.
The town of Rabbit Hash, Kentucky has repeatedly elected a ______ as its mayor.
In Switzerland it is illegal to own just one ______, because they get lonely.
Astronauts on the ISS are not allowed to bring ______ because the crumbs float everywhere.
The inventor of the Pringles can had his ashes buried in a ______.
A group of flamingos is called a ______.
In 1518, the city of Strasbourg suffered a plague of uncontrollable ______.
Bananas are naturally slightly ______, which is why they trigger airport radiation detectors.
The unicorn is the official national animal of ______.
In Victorian England, people mailed each other insulting anonymous cards on ______.
The world record for the loudest burp is louder than a ______.
Oklahoma's official state vegetable is technically a fruit: the ______.
